testimonials.quote: I came in for a cut and left having talked about my father for the first time in years. That was the first place I felt safe enough to say it out loud.
testimonials.name: Marcus T.

testimonials.quote: Station 3 broke something open in me. I finally understood why I react the way I do. The Trigger Tracker changed my relationships.
testimonials.name: DeShawn W.

testimonials.quote: The restoration oil sits on my bathroom shelf. Every morning I use it, I remember that care is something I can practice, not just receive.
testimonials.name: Jordan M.

chair.title: Start with the Chair
chair.description: You likely need embodied trust first: ritual, presence, grooming, and a real conversation in a human space.

academy.title: Enter the Academy
academy.description: You likely want language, structure, and a repeatable framework for decoding the patterns underneath your life.

vault.title: Begin with the Vault
vault.description: You likely want tactile tools, books, and daily reminders that help you carry the work into ordinary life.

show.title: Watch the Show
show.description: You likely need a low-friction way to feel the voice, worldview, and emotional texture of the brand before choosing a deeper step.

circle.title: Join a Gathering
circle.description: You likely want communal learning, live reflection, and accountability with others entering the same work.
